name: The Out Door
short_description: You wake up in a closed room. To escape, you need to choose the correct door 100 times in a row. Solve the puzzles, attract luck, and clear the challenges. Intelligence, reflexes, accuracy, insight, and gaming skills—everything will be tested.
detailed_description:
You wake up in a closed room.

To escape, you need to choose the correct door 100 times in a row.

Solve the puzzles, attract luck, and clear the challenges.
Intelligence, reflexes, accuracy, insight, and gaming skills—everything will be tested.

Hints for Success

You don't necessarily need to know the correct answer.
One of the two doors is always correct.

Regarding Streaming

  • There are no restrictions on streaming, whether for individuals, corporations, for-profit, or non-profit.
  • We are not responsible for any damages resulting from streaming videos of this game.
